decisions.title: Click-to-foot attribution
decisions.decision: Attribute Button 1 using planted-contact state machine (tail-only→ollie, nose-only→nollie, both→push) plus click-centered motion windows. Do not require pressure or mechanical force. Optional spatial/pressure heuristics only after capability probe.
alternatives: Assume hardware per-finger click (impossible on PTP Button 1)
Always assign click to rear foot
unresolvedQuestions: Whether advanced difficulty allows both+click ollie

decisions.title: Post dual-lift reassignment
decisions.decision: Deterministic bipartite match of HID contacts to logical padLeft/padRight using predicted position, velocity, and pad-X prior; dual-lift timeout falls back to spatial order; no random; no silent mid-trick rebind.
alternatives: Bind permanently to first HID ids
unresolvedQuestions: Predict horizon and reset timeout values
Measured ID swap rate on target hardware (P0)

decisions.title: Relative board-local control model
decisions.decision: Reject finite pad→world position teleport. Use board-local relative control: rest pose calibration, segment yaw-rate steering, soft recenter, edge clamp without world snap, foot slide as deck offset.

decisions.title: Trick primitive matrix v0 scope
decisions.decision: Ship push, steer, ollie, nollie, kickflip, heelflip, pop shuv 180, catch/land, 50-50; board motion authoritative; body mostly cosmetic. Defer manual, powerslide, revert, expanded grinds post G2.
alternatives: Body-stick emulation required for all tricks
unresolvedQuestions: Body varial pad signal if any

decisions.title: Ergonomics posture and fatigue
decisions.decision: Design for neutral wrist, slight finger flexion, reduce click rate (hold-push), independent handedness/stance, on-screen foot ghosts, session breaks. Validate with pain-map protocol; do not claim medical safety.
unresolvedQuestions: Mechanical vs haptic click fatigue delta

decisions.title: Reuse policy from audit
decisions.decision: Study RawInput.Touchpad for P0-B patterns; WebView2Samples for host messaging; Rapier/gltf/fast-check/three-mesh-bvh as pinned deps where needed; $P+ optional offline; reject AbsoluteTouchEx injection and unlicensed Shuvit assets.
unresolvedQuestions: Shuvit historical license file if ever referenced for assets

decisions.title: Pointer Events Level 3 status correction
decisions.decision: Reaffirm PE3 is a W3C Recommendation dated 30 June 2026 (history: CRD May 2026 → REC June 2026). Correct overclaim risk: PE3 status does NOT imply browser dual-foot trackpad coordinates. Soften any reading that PE3 browser support is universal for coalesced/predicted events (implementation varies). PE3 supersedes PE2 for the TR track.
alternatives: Treat PE3 as still Working Draft (false as of access date)
Assume PE3 unlocks trackpad multi-touch in Chrome
unresolvedQuestions: Per-browser matrix for pointerrawupdate and getCoalescedEvents on desktop

decisions.title: P0 measurements vs deferred playtest questions
decisions.decision: P0 must measure dual contact+lift, Button1 with plant counts, optional pressure/force presence, ID swap after dual lift, free dual-plant continuity. Defer threshold tuning, recenter constants, fatigue, and full trick feel to playtests after G1.
alternatives: Tune all thresholds before hardware proof

p0MustMeasure: Two contacts with independent tip/lift and usable sample rate
Button 1 edges while 0, 1, and 2 contacts planted (CSV)
Optional pressure and mechanical force present/stable?
HID contact ID reordering rate after dual lift + dual plant (n>=20)
Win11 GetPointerFrameTouchpadInfo continuous free dual-plant vs pan/zoom-only; else Raw Input
deferToPlaytest: Soft recenter and edge policies feel
Both+click as push vs ollie preference
Flick axis after natural hand angle
Pressure intensity curves if hardware supports
